source_pr.title: *: Merge Dumpling into TiDB
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/28844 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: add Dumpling into TiDB. Reopen https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/28848, https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/28980 for changed commit msg.

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [merge Dumpling into TiDB](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/28477) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:
- add Dumpling directory
- Makefile
- GitHub actions

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
Merge Dumpling repo into TiDB.
```

symptoms: + GOFLAGS += -race | c.Assert(q, Equals, "SELECT * FROM `test`.`t` ORDER BY _tidb_rowid") (dumpling/v4/export/sql_test.go)
failure_signature: + GOFLAGS += -race | c.Assert(q, Equals, "SELECT * FROM `test`.`t` ORDER BY _tidb_rowid") (dumpling/v4/export/sql_test.go)

evidence: evidence: + GOFLAGS += -race | c.Assert(q, Equals, "SELECT * FROM `test`.`t` ORDER BY _tidb_rowid") (dumpling/v4/export/sql_test.go)
